mapper.sql: SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.article_id, f.create_time, a.title as article_title, a.summary as article_summary, a.cover_image as article_cover_image FROM community_favorite f LEFT JOIN community_article a ON f.article_id = a.id
mapper.select: WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_favorite (user_id, article_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{articleId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
